item.potionenchant.universal_enchantment: You must hold an item in your off-hand!
item.potionenchant.universal_potion_bott: §cYou must hold an item in your off-hand!
effect.potionenchant.agility.description: During physical sprinting, the speed increases and the attack speed increases; Sprint speed increases by 30%% per level, attack speed increases by 50%% per level
effect.potionenchant.armor_break.descrip: Enable physical attacks to ignore and destroy the target's armor, with a durability base of 10%% for ignoring and destroying+10%% for each level
effect.potionenchant.combo.description: Long press the left mouse button on the entity to automatically perform the next attack when the attack cooldown is completed
effect.potionenchant.critical_strike.des: Empower entities with critical strike capability, with a 20%% critical strike rate for Level I potions, followed by a 10%% increase in critical strike rate for each level thereafter
effect.potionenchant.firmness.descriptio: Each damage taken is limited to maximum 90%% of max health, armor damage limited to 90%%. Each level reduces damage taken and armor degradation by 10%%, minimum 1%%. After taking damage, locks health for 1 second, each level adds 0.5 seconds to lock duration, maximum 10 seconds
effect.potionenchant.fragility.descripti: Make the entity lose invincible frames and take 0.1 magic damage per tick
effect.potionenchant.grudge.description: Entities that damage you also take the same damage; entities that heal you also receive the same healing
effect.potionenchant.magic_resistance.de: Reduces magic damage taken by 10%% per level, maximum 90%% reduction
effect.potionenchant.mending.description: Repair the durability of items in the physical inventory, repairing 1 *%% of the durability of the potion level per second per level
effect.potionenchant.overload.descriptio: When the entity is injured, the effect level of the loaded potion is+1. Deals damage equal to 5%%*level of its max health to entities within a 5-block radius, producing the same particle effects. When the level reaches X, the entity will self destruct and receive explosive damage equal to its self generated life limit
effect.potionenchant.phase_lock.descript: Marks an entity after a successful hit. If an attack misses the marked entity (when swinging item with left click), it will also deal 100%% of the player's last attack damage plus 25%% per level to the marked entity
effect.potionenchant.purification.descri: Clear the negative effects of the entity and prevent them from being added to the entity
effect.potionenchant.range_extension.des: Increase the range of physical attacks by adding 0.5 blocks per level
effect.potionenchant.revival.description: When the entity dies, cancel the death and restore all health points. After triggering this effect, the potion level will be -1
effect.potionenchant.sanctuary.descripti: Clear all potion effects of the entity except for holiness, and prevent other potion effects from being added to the entity. Holiness itself will not be cleared by conventional methods
effect.potionenchant.siphon.description: Restore health and hunger when causing damage to an entity, with a base of 5%%+5%% per level, and gain experience points of 10%% damage+10%% per level
effect.potionenchant.void_power.descript: Enable entities to deal additional void damage, increasing the current total damage by 10%% for each level
effect.potionenchant.vulnerability.descr: Increases the damage suffered by entities by 50%% per level
enchantment.potionenchant.advanced_mendi: Absorbs experience to repair item durability with twice the efficiency of normal mending
enchantment.potionenchant.advanced_prote: Provides more protection than regular Protection
enchantment.potionenchant.advanced_sharp: Increases attack damage more than regular Sharpness
enchantment.potionenchant.ash_extinction: Attacks on burning enemies ignore invulnerability frames
enchantment.potionenchant.auto_smelt.des: Automatically smelts mined blocks and benefits from Fortune enchantment
enchantment.potionenchant.blaze_aspect.d: Increases damage against burning enemies by 50% per level
enchantment.potionenchant.critical_strik: After a critical hit, your attacks ignore invulnerability frames for 1 second plus 1 second per level
enchantment.potionenchant.damage_storage: Stores damage taken and releases it on your next attack
enchantment.potionenchant.elemental_affi: Provides elemental protection in fire, lava or water, and immunity to freezing in powder snow
enchantment.potionenchant.life_link.desc: Continuously consumes chestplate durability to keep your health at maximum
enchantment.potionenchant.lifesteal.desc: Steals life from targets when attacking
enchantment.potionenchant.mana_focus.des: Converts damage dealt to magic damage and reduces magic damage taken
enchantment.potionenchant.potion_bane.de: Increases damage against enemies with potion effects
enchantment.potionenchant.reforge.desc: Automatically repairs the item when durability is almost depleted, but enchantment level decreases
gui.potionenchant.armorx.applied: §aSuccessfully applied %d potion effects to X armor
gui.potionenchant.no_adjustments: Use +/- buttons to adjust enchantment levels
gui.potionenchant.select_enchant_hint: Select an enchantment from the left list
gui.potionenchant.select_hint: Select a potion effect from the left list
gui.potionenchant.slot.head: Helmet
gui.potionenchant.upgrade.title: X Armor Upgrade
command.potionenchant.armorx.not_full_se: §cYou must wear a full set of X armor to use this command!
config.potionenchant.allow_enchant_level: When enabled, enchantments applied via Universal Enchantment Book have no level cap (can exceed 255). Requires game restart.
config.potionenchant.allow_potion_level_: When enabled, potion enchantment levels can exceed vanilla limit of 255 (up to Integer.MAX_VALUE). Use with caution as very high levels may cause unexpected behavior.
config.potionenchant.blacklisted_effects: List of potion effects that cannot be enchanted onto armor or tools. Format: modid:effect_name, e.g., minecraft:strength
config.potionenchant.custom_potion_hud.t: Enable custom potion effect HUD (text-based instead of icons), default off
config.potionenchant.enchant_book_chest_: Enchantment Books Obtainable from Chest Loot
When enabled, this mod's enchantment books can be found in chest loot. Default: on
config.potionenchant.enchant_book_villag: Enchantment Books Obtainable from Villager Trading
When enabled, this mod's enchantment books can be obtained via villager trading. Default: on
config.potionenchant.discoverable_in_enc: When enabled, this mod's enchantments can be obtained via the vanilla enchanting table. Default: off
config.potionenchant.enable_all_potion_d: Try to show descriptions for all potions from any mod, requires language file key: effect.xxx.xxx.description
config.potionenchant.enable_armor_value_: Render extra armor overlays (magic resist, resistance border, >20 armor)
config.potionenchant.enable_custom_potio: Enable custom tooltip for potions to show effect descriptions
config.potionenchant.enable_potion_encha: When enabled, items with potion enchantments will show a custom tooltip with enchantment details (specific items always use custom tooltip)
config.potionenchant.enable_vanilla_poti: Show description for vanilla Minecraft potions (requires .description key in language file)
config.potionenchant.enchant_book_xp_cos: Enchant Book XP Cost Per Level (Points)
Experience level cost per enchantment level for the Universal Enchantment Book. Default: 1000
config.potionenchant.hud_high_priority.t: Set custom potion HUD rendering priority to highest, ensuring it displays above other overlays
Whether to limit the number of potion enchantments for all items
config.potionenchant.limit_armor_enchant: Whether to limit the number of potion enchantments on each armor piece.
config.potionenchant.max_all_enchants.to: Maximum number of potion effects that can be enchanted on all items
Maximum number of potion enchantments allowed on each armor piece. Only effective if limit_armor_enchants is true.
config.potionenchant.max_potion_enchant_: Maximum Potion Enchantment Level on Equipped Items
Maximum level for potion enchantments on equipped items, default 100, customizable
config.potionenchant.max_visible_effects: Maximum number of potion effects visible at once, scroll with mouse wheel to see more
config.potionenchant.potion_enchant_tool: Maximum number of potion enchantments per column in tooltip, auto-wraps to next column when exceeded
config.potionenchant.show_potion_level.t: Show potion effect level in custom HUD (e.g., 1, 2, 3)
config.potionenchant.show_scroll_hint.to: Show scroll hint text (Tab+Scroll Wheel) in custom HUD
config.potionenchant.show_text_backgroun: Show semi-transparent text background box in custom HUD to prevent overlap
config.potionenchant.title: Potion Enchant Configuration
config.potionenchant.ultimate_potion_amu: Ultimate Potion Amulet Loot Generation Chance
Chance for Ultimate Potion Amulet to generate in loot tables (0-100%%), 0 means never generate, 100 means always generate when conditions are met. Supports chest loot tables from all mods
tooltip.potionenchant.ultimate_potion_am: A powerful amulet that can hold unlimited potion enchantments
message.potionenchant.enchant_book.canno: This enchantment cannot be applied to this item!
message.potionenchant.reforge_final: §6%s§r triggered the final reforge! Reforge enchantment is depleted
message.plentyofenchant.reforge_final: §6%s§r triggered the final reforge! Reforge enchantment is depleted
gui.potionenchant.not_enough_xp_table: Not enough XP! Need %s, you have %s
config.potionenchant.effect.critical_str: Base critical strike trigger chance (0.0 ~ 1.0), Default: 0.2
Extra critical strike chance per level (0.0 ~ 1.0), Default: 0.1
Critical strike damage multiplier (original damage x this), Default: 1.5
config.potionenchant.effect.void_power.d: Extra void damage per level (0.1 = 10%), Default: 0.1
Armor Break - Armor Ignore Per Level
Armor ignore ratio per level (0.1 = 10%), Default: 0.1
Armor Break - Durability Damage Per Level
Armor durability damage ratio per level (0.01 = 1%), Default: 0.01
config.potionenchant.effect.siphon.lifes: Extra lifesteal ratio per level (0.05 = 5%), Default: 0.05
config.potionenchant.effect.mending.repa: Durability repaired per level per second, Default: 10
config.potionenchant.effect.firmness.max: Base max damage percent per hit (0.9 = 90%), Default: 0.9
Max damage reduction per level (0.1 = 10%), Default: 0.1
config.potionenchant.effect.firmness.loc: Lock duration increase per level (seconds), Default: 0.5
config.potionenchant.effect.magic_resist: Magic damage reduction per level (0.1 = 10%), Default: 0.1
config.potionenchant.effect.overload.max: Amplifier level to trigger explosion (starts from 0), Default: 9
config.potionenchant.enchantment.advance: Protection points per level (each point reduces ~4% damage), Default: 5
config.potionenchant.enchantment.blaze_a: Blaze Aspect - Fire Seconds Per Level
Fire duration in seconds per level, Default: 4
config.potionenchant.enchantment.wither_: Wither Aspect - Wither Seconds Per Level
Wither effect duration in seconds per level, Default: 4
Wither effect amplifier (0 = Wither I), Default: 0
config.potionenchant.enchantment.mana_fo: Magic damage reduction per level (0.1 = 10%), Default: 0.1
Mana Focus - Damage Increase Per Level
Magic damage increase per level (0.25 = +25%), Default: 0.25
config.potionenchant.enchantment.potion_: Potion Bane - Damage Multiplier Per Level
Extra damage multiplier per level (1.0 = +100%), Default: 1.0
config.potionenchant.enchantment.damage_: Max storage multiplier (x max health), Default: 10.0
Storage decay time in seconds (resets to 0 after exceeding), Default: 60
config.potionenchant.ultimate_table_xp_c: Ultimate Table XP Cost Per Level (Points)
Experience point cost per enchantment level for the Ultimate Enchanting Table. Default: 1000
config.potionenchant.max_potion_enchant_: Max Potion Enchant Level Per Item
Maximum cumulative potion enchantment level per piece of equipment (1-255). Default: 5
config.potionenchant.allow_curio_potion_: Whether to allow potion enchantments on Curios (accessories) items. Disabling will stop curio potion enchant effects from applying. Default: true
config.potionenchant.enable_custom_main_: Replace the Minecraft main menu title, background and music with custom ones, and add particle effects. Default: OFF
config.potionenchant.custom_main_menu_mu: List of music tracks to play on the main menu (modid:sound_event_name format). The first track will play when list is not empty.
config.potionenchant.enable_menu_paralla: Moves the background slightly as you move your mouse, creating a depth effect. Default: ON
config.potionenchant.menu_parallax_max_o: Maximum pixel offset for each direction of the parallax effect. Range: 5~60. Default: 27
config.potionenchant.enable_menu_vignett: Add white fog gradient (edge blur) effect on custom menu background edges. Default: enabled
config.potionenchant.menu_fog_range.tool: How far the fog extends from each edge toward center. Range: 0~100. Default: 3
Base size of menu particles in pixels. Range: 8~64. Default: 21
config.potionenchant.particle_size_sprea: Random size addition range (0 = fixed size). Range: 0~48. Default: 17
config.potionenchant.particle_speed_h.to: Horizontal movement speed (0 = no horizontal movement). Range: 0~100. Default: 12
config.potionenchant.particle_speed_v.to: Base vertical movement speed. Range: 1~100. Default: 8
config.potionenchant.particle_speed_v_sp: Random vertical speed addition. Range: 0~100. Default: 25
config.potionenchant.particle_fade_in.to: Duration of fade-in effect in ticks. Range: 1~100. Default: 25
config.potionenchant.particle_fade_out.t: Duration of fade-out before death in ticks. Range: 1~100. Default: 40
config.potionenchant.particle_go_up.tool: Toggle particle direction: on=upward, off=downward. Default: on (upward)
Maximum number of particles on the main menu. Range: 5~100. Default: 25
config.potionenchant.particle_fade_y_sta: Screen position where particles start fading. 0=bottom, 100=top. Default: 10
config.potionenchant.particle_spawn_rate: Particles spawned per second. Range: 1~20. Default: 2
config.potionenchant.mouse_trail_size.to: Base size of mouse trail particles. Range: 4~64. Default: 32
config.potionenchant.mouse_trail_lifetim: How long trail particles last in ms. Range: 200~3000. Default: 800
config.potionenchant.mouse_trail_spawn_i: Interval between trail particle spawns in ms. Smaller = denser. Range: 10~200. Default: 30
config.potionenchant.mouse_trail_fade_de: How long before trail starts fading. 0=fade from start, 100=never fade. Default: 0
config.potionenchant.mouse_trail_click_c: Particles spawned on mouse click (set 0 to disable). Range: 0~100. Default: 15
